text:
どうかな？
先生が教えたとおり戦えた？

訓練してわかったと思うけど、
クラススキルがすごく大事なの。

これからも頑張って、
ファミリアと息ぴったり戦えるようになって
How did it go? Did you fight like I taught you to?
I'm sure you've figured it out from your training, but Class Skills are really important.
Keep at it, and you'll be fighting alongside your Familiars as a single unit in no time!
